title: psoralea laxiflora
intro: Psoralea laxiflora, also known as biota or Chinese fleece flower, is a flowering plant that belongs to the legume family, Fabaceae. Its medicinal properties include its ability to stimulate the thyroid gland, promote the growth of hair, and improve the overall health of the skin. The health benefits of Psoralea laxiflora include treating hyperthyroidism, alopecia, and skin conditions such as eczema and psoriasis. Herbal preparations of Psoralea laxiflora can be made into capsules, teas, or infusions, and are commonly used in traditional Chinese medicine.
